decisions.title: C6-C8 resume baseline
decisions.description: Resuming chain from C5 stop with scope C6..C8 only. Baseline checks passed before edits: `make docs-check-full` PASS (real 5.11s), `make invariants-check` PASS (real 0.06s). Branch: `feat/w4-w5-extreme-runtime`. Existing `.context` workflow state changes are ignored for code commits.

decisions.title: C6-C8 risk review
decisions.description:
C6 risk: replay trigger misses relevant files. Mitigation: explicit regex for replay/envelope/sequencer/storage paths and manual `make test-replay-golden` gate.
C7 risk: proto gates flaky due missing tooling/network. Mitigation: `proto-tools` ensures local toolchain and `proto-check` fails clearly on missing tools or dirty generated output.
C8 risk: ci-local too strict for some local environments. Mitigation: deterministic stop-on-fail order and clear dependency on C6/C7 targets; rollback by commit.

decisions.title: C6 checkpoint
decisions.description: Commit `142adb8` (`build(replay): add replay golden target and trigger rule`). Files: `Makefile` only. Added `test-replay-golden` and `test-replay-golden-if-needed` with explicit trigger regex over replay/envelope/sequencer/storage paths. Gates after commit: `make test-replay-golden` PASS (real 3.13s), `make docs-check-full` PASS (real 5.08s), `make invariants-check` PASS (real 0.06s). Rollback: `git revert 142adb8`.

decisions.title: C7 checkpoint
decisions.description:
Commit `afcd3f6` (`build(proto): add proto tools and incremental check`). Files: `Makefile`, `proto/buf.gen.yaml`. Added deterministic `proto-tools` local toolchain, updated proto plugin command to `protoc-gen-go`, and added `proto-check` incremental dirty-tree verification on generated outputs.
Gates after commit: `make proto-lint` PASS (real 0.11s), `make proto-breaking` PASS/skip (real 0.03s, no main proto baseline), `make proto-check` PASS (real 0.13s), `make docs-check-full` PASS (real 5.05s), `make invariants-check` PASS (real 0.06s).
Rollback: `git revert afcd3f6`.

decisions.title: C8 checkpoint
decisions.description:
Commit `c2abe04` (`build(ci-local): add strict local stop-on-fail chain`). Files: `Makefile` only. Added `ci-local` chain: quick -> docs-check-full -> invariants-check -> test-unit -> test-integration -> test-replay-golden -> proto-check.
Gates after commit: `make ci-local` PASS (warm real 13.26s), `make docs-check-full` PASS (real 4.99s), `make invariants-check` PASS (real 0.06s).
Rollback: `git revert c2abe04`.

decisions.title: C6-C8 validation summary
decisions.description:
Validation complete for resumed chain C6->C8. `make ci-local` warm PASS in 13.26s. Post-commit guard checks remained PASS for all commits: `make docs-check-full` and `make invariants-check`.
Transient failures during C7 were resolved before commit (quoted tool path with spaces, buf generate context, and proto-check scope to generated outputs only); no persistent STOP condition remained.
